name: watchState
title: Watch State
description: Watch a path in the global CVM state for changes. Returns a watchId. Changes are delivered as SSE notifications on the session's GET /mcp stream. Requires an active session (Mcp-Session-Id).

path.description: CVM path vector into the global state, e.g. '[:accounts #56785 :environment myvar]'

value.description: Current value at the path (if small enough, otherwise omitted)
